law: classifier emits command class, not creative roadmap
OPEN_OBJECTIVE_PROPOSAL_FROM_PRESSURE_CLASS is proposal-only and not an implementation command
AWAIT_REAL_BATCH_RECEIPTS is not a build command
STOP_LANE_CLOSED is terminal unless a new external objective is opened
classifier must not optimize, widen authority, or claim global planning

rules_ordered.if: unauthorized movement counted as radius or authority integrity violated

rules_ordered.guard: only exact declared command after authority check

rules_ordered.if: STOP_DONE and next_command_goal is null and no pressure remains
STOP_DONE and next_command_goal is null and metrics are demo-only
